subcodes.first_line: He is the All-Knowing, the All-Seeing! Thy letter was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوست دانا و بینا نامه ات رسید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings
